# Dopamine, Motivation & Drive

## TL;DR

Huberman reframes dopamine as the molecule of pursuit.

## Key Takeaways

- Dopamine signals anticipation, not reward. [[04:12]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abc123&t=252s)

## Concepts & Definitions
